tools.title: Services
tools.subtitle: Manage your MCP servers, tools, and toolboxes
tools.noToolsDescription: Connect to servers in the Marketplace to see tools here

infoBanner.serversTitle: Two distinct controls: server kill-switch and dynamic pool
infoBanner.serversDescription: Each server is a *catalog* of tools you can use. Your MCP client (Claude, Cursor, …) loads only the tools it needs into a session pool by calling `search`, then runs them via `execute`. From this page you don't pre-select tools — you keep their *server* on or suspended, and watch / clear the pool from the top-right widget.
infoBanner.hiddenLabel: Server suspended (excluded, even if a tool matches)
infoBanner.toolboxesTitle: Toolboxes = scoped access for API keys
infoBanner.toolboxesDescription: Toolboxes bundle specific tools and gate API keys to that subset. They are independent from the dynamic pool used by OAuth MCP clients.

pool.label: Active pool
pool.clearConfirm: Clear the active pool? Your MCP client will need to call `search` again to reload tools.

serverActions.enableServerHint: Tools from this server can enter the pool when an MCP client searches for them.
serverActions.suspendServerHint: Server kept connected, but its tools never enter the pool — useful to pause a noisy provider.
serverActions.deleteServerConfirm: Delete this server and its credentials?

groups.title: Toolboxes
groups.name: Toolbox name
groups.emptyDescription: Create toolboxes to organize which tools are available via API keys.
groups.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? API keys using this toolbox will lose their restrictions.

createModal.title: Create Toolbox
createModal.groupNamePlaceholder: e.g., Read Only, Production, Dev Environment
createModal.visibilityPrivateDesc: Only you can use this toolbox
createModal.connectServersFirst: Connect servers first to add tools to toolboxes

myServers.title: My Services
myServers.subtitle: Manage services and control tools exposed to Claude

info.title: Tool Visibility & Discovery
info.description: Active servers expose tools to Claude. Use toggle to control visibility.
info.hint: Tools appear after the server is started for the first time (via MCP call).

empty.title: No servers connected yet
empty.description: Get started by connecting your first MCP server from the marketplace.

orgCredentials.title: Organization Credentials Available
orgCredentials.description: These servers use organization credentials. You can use them without providing your own credentials.

visibility.title: Server status for the dynamic pool

tools.manualOverrideHint: Manual edit — your MCP client's next `search` may flip this back.
tools.discoveringNote: Tools will appear after server initialization
tools.notConnectedNote: Start the server to discover available tools

errors.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this credential?
errors.stopConfirm: Are you sure you want to stop this server?

empty.title: No team servers yet
empty.description: Team servers are shared with all organization members. Only admins can add them.
empty.hint: Go to Organization Settings to manage shared credentials.

banner.title: Team Services
banner.description: These servers are shared with all organization members. Credentials are managed by admins.

team.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this team credential? This action cannot be undone.
team.visibleToAllDesc: All team members can see and use this server
team.adminOnlyDesc: Only admins can see this credential (used as fallback)
team.updateCredentialsHint: Leave empty to keep existing values
team.leaveEmptyToKeep: Leave empty to keep current value

workspace.subtitle: Drag tools into the active pool, group them into toolboxes, or let the assistant suggest what to load.
workspace.searchPlaceholder: Search a tool by name, description or server…
workspace.toolboxLoadHint: Load every tool of this toolbox into the pool
workspace.newToolboxDrop: Drop tools here to create a new toolbox

empty.catalog: No tool yet — connect a server in the Marketplace.
empty.pool: Pool empty — drop tools from the catalog or use the assistant.
empty.toolboxes: No toolbox yet — drop a few tools on the new toolbox area to create one.

toast.compositionAlwaysIn: Composed tools are always in the pool.
toast.compositionToolboxBlocked: Compositions cannot be added to toolboxes yet.

assistant.title: Suggest tools for a goal
assistant.hint: Describe what you want to do; the assistant scores your enabled tools and proposes a selection to load into the pool.
assistant.goalPlaceholder: e.g. Manage DNS records on Hostinger
assistant.alsoCompose: Looking for a multi-step workflow? Compose it with the LLM.
assistant.toolboxHint: Describe a persona, a recurring task, or the kind of help you want. The assistant scores your enabled tools and proposes a ready-to-save toolbox.
assistant.intentPlaceholder: e.g. DevOps assistant for managing my Hostinger DNS, VPS and billing
assistant.noPick: The LLM did not select any tool. Try a more specific intent.
assistant.toolboxCreatedAndLoaded: Toolbox created and {{count}} tools loaded into the pool.
assistant.toolboxRenamed: A toolbox with the same name existed — saved as "{{name}}".

toolboxEdit.title: Edit toolbox
toolboxEdit.hint: Rename, recolor, prune the items, or delete this toolbox entirely.
toolboxEdit.name: Name
toolboxEdit.deleteConfirm: Delete this toolbox? Tools themselves are kept.

servers.loadAllHint: Load every tool from this service into the pool
servers.revokeConfirm: Revoke "{{name}}"? Stored credentials are deleted; tools will no longer reach this service.

newToolbox.title: New toolbox
newToolbox.hint: Group these tools under a name. Toolboxes can be loaded into the pool in one click later.

compositions.title: Composed Tools
compositions.subtitle: Build, save and execute multi-step workflows. Production composed tools become first-class MCP tools, available via search/execute.
compositions.testWithPromptHint: Describe in natural language what you want — the LLM will infer the inputs from your prompt.
compositions.name: Composition name
compositions.runtimeParamsNote: Runtime parameter input coming soon. For now, compositions use default parameters.
compositions.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

empty.title: No Compositions
empty.description: Compositions are created when you orchestrate multiple tools together. Use the AI assistant to create your first workflow.
empty.noMatch: No compositions match your filters. Try adjusting your search.

inputForm.noInputsRequired: No parameters required for this composition

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.description: BigMCP helps you manage and orchestrate MCP servers

connect.title: Connect a Server
connect.description: Browse the marketplace and connect your first server

configure.title: Configure Credentials
configure.description: Set up credentials for your connected servers

explore.title: Explore Tools
explore.description: Discover the tools available from your servers

complete.title: You're all set!
complete.description: Start using your tools and create compositions
